text:
(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates that include the words “Register to Vote.”

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of an account created by the comptroller in the manner provided by Section 504.6012 (Elimination of Dedicated Revenue Accounts; Revenues in Trust) (b). Money deposited to that account may be used only by the secretary of state for Project V.O.T.E. or a successor voter education program administered by the office of the secretary of state.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.671 by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(108), eff. September 1, 2021.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.672 — Register to Vote License Plates

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates that include the words “Register to Vote.”

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of an account created by the comptroller in the manner provided by Section 504.6012 (Elimination of Dedicated Revenue Accounts; Revenues in Trust) (b). Money deposited to that account may be used only by the secretary of state for Project V.O.T.E. or a successor voter education program administered by the office of the secretary of state.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.671 by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(108), eff. September 1, 2021.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 480 (H.B.1130), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.*

Money deposited to that account may be used only by the secretary of state for Project V.O.T.E. or a successor voter education program administered by the office of the secretary of state.
Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.671 by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(108), eff. September 1, 2021.
